title: [Title: the decision in one line]
context: [The situation and the forces in tension. What prompted this decision? Keep it specific and falsifiable — what's actually true, not vibes. If this reverses or revises an earlier call, name it.]
decision: [The choice, stated plainly. What we will do — and, where it sharpens the decision, what we will NOT do.]
consequences: [What follows: the trade-offs accepted, what this enables, what it forecloses. If it supersedes an earlier ADR, set the `supersedes` field to that number and set `supersededBy` on the old record.]
staysTrue: [The things this decision does NOT change — guardrails and prior commitments that still hold. Prevents over-reading the change. Optional but useful.]
